task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmark Bar should show the deletion or absence of bookmarks for YouTube, Netflix, Spotify, Instagram, TikTok, Twitch, Hulu, and Disney+.

task_completion.description: Organize remaining bookmarks into three specific folders on the bookmark bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark Bar or Bookmark Manager must display exactly three new folders named 'Weather & Tides', 'Port & Coast Guard', and 'Vessel Operations'.

task_completion.description: Disable image loading and page preloading in Chrome settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings must show 'Don't allow sites to show images' selected under Site Settings > Images, and the 'Preload pages' toggle turned off under Performance or Privacy settings.

task_completion.description: Set the browser startup behavior to open the New Tab page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Chrome Settings 'On startup' page must show the radio button for 'Open the New Tab page' selected.

task_completion.description: Add a custom site search engine for NOAA buoys
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of Chrome Settings 'Manage search engines and site search' must show a custom entry with the keyword 'buoy' and the URL 'https://www.ndbc.noaa.gov/station_page.php?station=%s'.

task_completion.description: Configure specific Chrome flags for low-bandwidth environments
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'chrome://flags' page must show 'Show Saved Copy Button' set to Enabled, 'Back-forward cache' set to Enabled, and 'Experimental QUIC protocol' set to Disabled.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser UI, Settings pages, Bookmark Manager, and chrome://flags being actively navigated and clicked, rather than a terminal window executing commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing Chrome's internal JSON or SQLite files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) or database browsers open modifying files like 'Preferences', 'Local State', 'Bookmarks', or 'Web Data'.

integrity.description: The agent manually created folders and moved bookmarks in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the process of right-clicking to add folders, dragging and dropping bookmarks, or using the Bookmark Manager interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 8 entertainment domains to verify as removed are: youtube.com, netflix.com, spotify.com, instagram.com, tiktok.com, twitch.tv, hulu.com, and disneyplus.com. The 3 exact bookmark folders to be created are: 'Weather & Tides', 'Port & Coast Guard', and 'Vessel Operations'. The custom search engine must use the keyword 'buoy' and URL pattern 'ndbc.noaa.gov'. The required Chrome flags are 'Show Saved Copy Button' (Enabled), 'Back-forward cache' (Enabled), and 'Experimental QUIC protocol' (Disabled).
